title: Government UFO file release renews interest in southern Ohio sightings
UFO files mention bright lights, orbs
description: SIOUX FALLS, S.D. (KELO) -- South Dakota has had at least 433 reported sightings of unidentified flying objects (UFOs) since 1897, according to the National UFO Reporting Center (NUFORC) website. The reporting sighting in 1897 was an "object descends and follows locomotive." The website credits the book "SDUFO: A Case History" (2004) by Greg Nedved [...]

title: Eight chilling never-before-seen UFO videos at center of explosive disclosure battle detailed by insider
description: The disclosure battle has now centered on 46 UFO videos that lawmakers recently demanded for release, but an insider has eight of the classified clips.

title: EXCLUSIVE: Chandra Levy's Dad Claims THE CIA 'Wiped Out' His Murdered Daughter to Protect the Government's UFO Secrets — in Bombshell Interview 25 Years After She Died
description: 25 years after Chandra Levy's chilling disappearance, her father, Robert, has claimed his daughter may have been 'wiped out' by the CIA.

title: COLUMN: Angels, Demons and Centuries of UFO Questions
description: For centuries, stargazers of many kinds have debated the meaning of unidentified objects in the heavens and encounters with mysterious beings on earth.
